items.question: My clock-in / clock-out (punch) was not recorded
items.description:
My entry/exit punch was not recorded correctly in the ERP system.
Date(s) affected: [DATE]
What is wrong (missing entry, missing exit, wrong time): [DETAILS]

items.question: My timesheet shows a shortfall or was calculated incorrectly
items.description:
My timesheet was not calculated correctly and shows a work-hour shortfall.
Month / date range: [DATE]
Expected vs. shown hours: [DETAILS]

items.question: I get an "attendance month is locked" error when submitting my timesheet
items.summary: Attendance month locked - cannot submit timesheet
items.description:
When I try to register my timesheet/mission manually, the system shows the error "you cannot create ... because the attendance month is locked for edits" and blocks me.
Month: [MONTH]
Item I am trying to register (timesheet / mission / leave): [DETAILS]

items.question: I cannot register work hours or leave on a holiday (shift work)
items.description:
I work in shifts and the system does not let me register work hours or leave on holidays - it counts the hours as zero.
Date(s): [DATE]
Shift / schedule details: [DETAILS]

items.question: I registered a leave request by mistake and want it cancelled
items.description:
I registered leave by mistake and would like it removed. I was actually present at work on those days.
Date(s) to cancel: [DATE]

items.question: My business trip (mission) was not registered correctly
items.description:
My business trip (mission) record is missing or incorrect in the system.
Date(s): [DATE]
Destination / details: [DETAILS]

items.question: Request timesheet-approver access for an employee
items.description:
Please create timesheet-approver access for the following employee:
Full name: [NAME]
Employee ID: [EMPLOYEE_ID]
Department / team: [DEPARTMENT]

items.question: Request a job position / job title change in ERP
items.description:
Please apply the following job position / title change in the ERP system:
Full name: [NAME]
Employee ID: [EMPLOYEE_ID]
New position / title: [NEW_POSITION]

items.question: Request a contract type update in the system
items.description:
Please update the contract information in the system:
Full name: [NAME]
Employee ID: [EMPLOYEE_ID]
Requested change: [DETAILS]

items.question: My personal profile information is incorrect (name, cost center, ...)
items.description:
Some of my personal profile information in the system is incorrect and needs correction.
Field(s) to correct: [FIELD]
Correct value: [VALUE]

items.question: Request my payslip / salary information
items.description:
Please provide my payslip / salary information.
Month(s): [MONTH]
Purpose (if relevant): [DETAILS]

items.question: My salary or overtime was calculated incorrectly
items.description:
My salary or overtime for this period appears to be calculated incorrectly.
Month: [MONTH]
What looks wrong: [DETAILS]

items.question: The Loan option is not available in Staff - request activation
items.description:
The Loan option is not available for me in the Staff platform. Please activate it for my account.
Employee ID: [EMPLOYEE_ID]
Purpose (loan request / guarantor): [DETAILS]

items.question: I get a guarantor error when registering a loan request
items.description:
When registering my loan request, the system shows a guarantor error (e.g. "two guarantors" or guarantor-approval error) even though the guarantor has approved.
Loan type: [LOAN_TYPE]
Exact error message: [ERROR]

items.question: A loan was approved twice / moved to the wrong stage - revert it
items.description:
A loan request was approved twice by mistake and moved to the wrong stage. Please revert it to the previous stage.
Loan reference: [LOAN_REF]
Current stage / requested stage: [DETAILS]

items.question: I get an error when submitting my performance evaluation
items.description:
When I try to submit my performance evaluation in Staff, the system shows an error.
Evaluation period: [PERIOD]
Exact error message: [ERROR]

items.question: Request access to submit my self-assessment
items.description:
Please open my access to submit the self-assessment score.
Evaluation period (season): [PERIOD]
Employee ID: [EMPLOYEE_ID]

items.question: Request a Staff account for a new employee
items.summary: Create Staff account for new employee
items.description:
Please create a Staff platform account for the following new employee:
Full name: [NAME]
Employee ID: [EMPLOYEE_ID]
Department / start date: [DETAILS]

items.question: Request VPN or Jabber access
items.description:
Please set up the following access for me:
Service (VPN / Jabber): [SERVICE]
Employee ID: [EMPLOYEE_ID]
Business reason: [DETAILS]

items.question: The Staff platform will not load or shows a server error
items.summary: Staff platform not loading / server error
items.description:
The Staff platform does not load or shows a server error when I open it.
What I was doing: [DETAILS]
Exact error message (if any): [ERROR]
